rationale: The cited paper directly studies promotion-driven purchase acceleration (pre/postpromotion dips) in high-stockpiling categories using store-level scanner data, which is closely aligned with the citing paper’s core constructs of stockpiling, flexible consumption, and promotion outcomes. Given the citing note explicitly says it connects to prior empirical evidence on consumption/primary-demand effects, this citation is plausibly serving as a substantive mechanism/empirical foundation rather than an incidental mention.
